base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of item_rupee_yellow — a pickup_item from 1986 legend of zelda. Yellow Rupee — 2-frame shimmer. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Yellow Rupee — 2-frame shimmer; worth 5 rupees; rarer drop
